title: 有馬記念の後に・未来のために

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seiun Sky does an incredible job in the Arima
Kinen, but she comes back with a stern look on
her face.
choice_data_list: Did you have a good time?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: ...Yeah, I did. It was fun and all, but...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: It was a bit... more than I expected.
choice_data_list: Are you talking about Grass Wonder?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. I knew she was strong to begin with and
that she'd gotten better since healing from her
injury.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: But it's like she evolved into her second form!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Of course, of course. It's 'cause I used every trick I
had up my sleeves for this.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I wasn't arrogant, and I didn't underestimate the
competition. I took it as seriously as anyone else,
but still...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She suddenly goes silent. Looking closely, I can
tell that her shoulders are trembling.
choice_data_list: ...Should we have a secret strategy meeting?
...Should we have a secret strategy meeting?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
That's what I mean. We're gonna have to use our
heads, otherwise I won't make it through my
senior year.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
So, yeah... Let's have a super fun strategy
meeting.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As Sky shakes off her worries and readies herself
to push forward, another figure in the vicinity
watches.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: So... this is where it ends.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: I'm finally prepared.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: You have to walk your path. And I...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Will walk mine.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
By the way, I wanted to talk to you about my next
race... if ya don't mind, hehe...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: How about we do the spring Tenno Sho?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The spring Tenno Sho is a historic race of high
status. It's also the longest of the G1 races at
3,200 meters.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I think I could give quite the performance in a
long distance race.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
And if I win, I can change my name to Seiun
Stayer. ☆

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Besides, Spe will be there too. I'm sure of it...
maybe. I just kinda feel it in my gut.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems she wants to test her true ability and face
off against her greatest rival once more.
choice_data_list:
Sounds good. Let's race in the spring Tenno
Sho.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Nice, full steam ahead.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Except... I'm out of steam for today—like, tired as
a dog and dead on my feet.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Hey, why don't we have our meeting over lunch?
Treat me to something extra special! ☆

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
That worked? It's never a bad idea to ask! I'm
gonna eat till I drop!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
S, S, S! ♪ The S in Sky stands for... Sushi!
Sukiyaki! Seafood! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After a quick refueling, we set about ramping up
Seiun Sky's training in preparation for the spring
Tenno Sho!
